# viettelidc_vks_cluster_node_detail (Data Source)

Data source for retrieving details of a single VKS Cluster Node.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String)
- `node_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `ip_address` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `status` (String)
